description:
Multi-agent audit of every fixture's expected.specs against its input.fz, asking: is each derived Descr as narrow as the program structure permits, and are spec keys correct?

For each fixture, the audit assesses:
  - Per-Var Descr narrowness (literal-narrow where possible?  where a singleton would do?)
  - Return Descr correctness (does it match the function body?)
  - Spec key precision (caller arg types flowed to entry params?)
  - Spec count (missing narrow specs? spurious wide ones?)

Findings file as child tickets under this epic, severity-tagged. Fixes are out of scope for the epic itself — each finding gets its own work ticket.

The audit is run by Explore subagents in parallel, each handling 5-6 fixtures. Aggregated results land here.
title: [EPIC] fz-ul4.27.22.22: fixture spec correctness audit
